mainEntity.name: Do I need lawyer for minor work injury in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: Do I need lawyer for minor work injury in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Often yes—even minor claims denied if disputed. Free consult assesses denial risk.

suggestedAnswer.text: Cottonwood Heights: insurers contest 'minor' for future claims. Lawyer prevents low settlements, ensures full medical paid. No cost unless win; stats show represented claims 2x higher.
